wave3b_reauthor_note: 4 candidates (CeH9/YH9/YH10/Li2MgH16) re-authored from failed crystal_sg+space_group decks to YH6-proven explicit ATOMIC_POSITIONS crystal (spglib orbit expansion); all 4 d16 PASS + FIRED on vast-cuda-ssh9-15988 (already-running pod, no new rent). Incremental cost ~ pod $0.40/hr x chain wall (within ~$24 budget). See exports/rtsc/wave3b_decks/D16-NOTES.md.

design_constraints.throttle_safety: per-pod cores_used <= 64 (16 core headroom), max 8 concurrent jobs
design_constraints.wall_objective: minimize BOTH RTSC-closure wall AND per-pod result wall (multi-objective)
design_constraints.load_balance: LPT bin-packing across pods, heavy jobs isolated to dedicated slots

vast-pod-2-new.rationale: heavy HE + ternary 클래스 분리 (Y2CdH18, HE 4-cation)

vast-pod-5-new.rationale: 계층 clathrate 단독 슬롯 (가장 무거움) + BeB2Hx + 작은 보조

ysbh6.recovered_note: ph recover (_ph0 CURRENT_Q=2, np32) pid407 Rep#18

y2be2h6.restart_note: scf iter#1 errcode72 (serial+cg+davidson+npool ALL crash) = pseudo/ecut low-level, NOT MPI/solver. relax geom complete+preserved → fixed deck reuses it.

LaBH8.structure: Fm-3m (#225) fcc, ibrav=2 primitive LaBH8, nat=10 (32f->8 H fold)
LaBH8.dryrun_verdict: PASS — 10 atoms/22 e-, bravais=2 fcc, SCF iterating ~-140.8 Ry, no errors
LaBH8.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: addresses <50GPa milestone (lowest pressure ternary hydride)

YH6.structure: Im-3m (#229) bcc clathrate, ibrav=1 conv cell Y2H12, nat=14
YH6.dryrun_verdict: PASS — 14 atoms/34 e-, SCF converging ~-179.81 Ry, no directive/pseudo errors
YH6.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: simplest bcc clathrate, measured anchor — validate hydride el-ph pipeline

Li2MgH16.structure: Fd-3m (#227, origin 2), ibrav=2 FCC-primitive EXPLICIT crystal (re-author wave-3b); Li 16c + Mg 8b + H 32e(x=0.833) + H 96g(x,x,z form) spglib orbit-expanded -> primitive; nat=38 Li4Mg2H32; min H-H 0.798 Ang
Li2MgH16.anchor_ref: Sun 2019 PRL 123,097001 — predicted 473K @ 250 GPa (highest predicted Tc)
Li2MgH16.coord_citation: Sun 2019 PRL (pred 473K@250GPa); Fd-3m#227 o2 Li 16c, Mg 8b(3/8,3/8,3/8), H 32e(x=0.833), H 96g recast as (x,x,z)=(0.0647,0.0647,0.4353). a=6.7185. FCC-primitive (ibrav=2) keeps nat=38 (vs 152 conventional). 96g brief-triple was a general-pos form (over-expand 192+overlap) -> recast to special (x,x,z).
Li2MgH16.dryrun_verdict: PASS — bravais=2 fcc, 38 atoms, 64 e-, SCF iterating ~-341.9 Ry, no check_atoms/input/rgen error. ibrav=2 FCC-prim cleared the ibrav-incompat error; Li.UPF GIPAW-strip fix cleared the QE-6.7 PP_GIPAW_ORBITALS xmltools EOF parser bug.
Li2MgH16.pseudo_note: Li.UPF -> Li.nogipaw.UPF (GIPAW block stripped + has_gipaw=false) — QE 6.7 parser fix; see exports/rtsc/wave3b_decks/D16-NOTES.md
Li2MgH16.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: highest predicted Tc ternary (473K) — coord-resolved skip-recovery

YH10.structure: Fm-3m (#225) sodalite, ibrav=2 FCC-primitive EXPLICIT crystal (re-author wave-3b); Y 4a + H 8c + H 32f(x=0.375) spglib orbit-expanded -> primitive; nat=11 YH10; min H-H 1.028 Ang
YH10.coord_citation: Liu/Peng 2017 PNAS (pred 303K@400GPa); LaH10-isostructural sodalite (Errea 2020 Nature). 32f free param x=0.375. FCC-primitive cell (ibrav=2) keeps nat=11 (vs 44 conventional).
YH10.dryrun_verdict: PASS — bravais=2 fcc, 11 atoms, 21 e-, SCF iterating ~-93.95 Ry, no check_atoms/input/rgen error. ibrav=2 FCC-prim cleared the original ibrav-incompatible-space-group error. (smallest cell -> already past vc-relax+scf into PH at snapshot)
YH10.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: room-T-class sodalite clathrate — coord-resolved skip-recovery

CeH9.structure: P6_3/mmc (#194), ibrav=4 EXPLICIT crystal (re-author wave-3b); Ce 2d(2/3,1/3,1/4) + H 2b/4f/12k spglib orbit-expanded; nat=20 Ce2H18; min H-H 1.120 Ang
CeH9.dryrun_verdict: PASS — bravais=4, 20 atoms, 40 e-, SCF iterating ~-273.5 Ry, no check_atoms/input/rgen error. Explicit-positions re-author cleared the original crystal_sg check_atoms overlap.
CeH9.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: lowest-pressure RE superhydride (synthesized <100 GPa) — coord-resolved skip-recovery

YH9.structure: P6_3/mmc (#194), ibrav=4 EXPLICIT crystal (re-author wave-3b); Y 2d + H 2b/4f/12k = CeH9 H29-clathrate isostructural transfer, spglib orbit-expanded; nat=20 Y2H18; min H-H 1.091 Ang
YH9.coord_citation: Kong 2021 (243K@201GPa); P6_3/mmc-1 H29-cage isostructural to CeH9 per arxiv 2302.01122. Coords = CeH9 set (12k z=0.062 corrected), Y->2d. Harmonic-stable >250 GPa (2302.01122 Fig S4).
YH9.dryrun_verdict: PASS — bravais=4, 20 atoms, 40 e-, SCF iterating ~-186.6 Ry, no check_atoms/input/rgen error. Explicit-positions re-author cleared the original crystal_sg check_atoms overlap.
YH9.hypothesis: wave-3 lit-known: highest measured RE-binary Tc (243K) — coord-resolved skip-recovery

rtsc_closure_wall.first_answer_what: Pod 1 완료 — 5D 지도 + 측정 anchor 확정 + sc/y/cah6 결과 (5D 빠진 축 닫힘 검증)
rtsc_closure_wall.complete_answer_what: Pod 1/3/4 완료 — 25 후보 중 22 결과 (HE + 계층 제외) → 최상위 5 후보 식별
rtsc_closure_wall.deep_dive_what: 전체 완료 — HE 4-cation + 계층 clathrate 포함 31 결과 + SSCHA + 5D 지도 완성
rtsc_closure_wall.sim_closure_what: harmonic 31 + top-5 SSCHA + top-2 mustar/isotope/P-ladder + paper finalize. R4 absorbed=false (wet-lab 측정) 외부 핸드오프 후 별도.
rtsc_closure_wall.L0_wet_lab: 외부 측정. R4 영구. 우리 통제 외 (개월~연 단위).
rtsc_closure_wall._note: 이전 deep_dive_h=120 = harmonic 31 모두 = L1. sim closure = L5 = 170h.

cost_summary.plan_revision: 128c 1개 pod로 wave-3 15+ 후보 동시 가능 → 2-pod plan (현 + 신규)이 5-pod보다 경제적

decision_gates.gate_50h: Pod 1 완료 시: 5D 지도 점 6개 + 최근접 후보 확정 → 다음 lens
decision_gates.gate_80h: Pod 3/4 완료 시: 22 후보 결과 → 최상위 5 후보 + paper 1차 갱신
decision_gates.gate_100h: Pod 2 완료 시: HE 4-cation 결과 → 4-cation 가설 close
decision_gates.gate_120h: Pod 5 완료 시: 계층 clathrate 결과 → 🥇 후보 verdict
decision_gates.gate_after_120h: 전체 결과로 paper finalize + 측정 wet-lab 핸드오프 결정

execution_order: 1. provision Pod 2/3/4/5 병렬 (~60min, vastai CLI 셋업 30min 포함)
2. pseudo 다운로드 + chain script 복붙 + decks 작성 (~30min)
3. 25 신규 job dispatch (Pod별 LPT 분배 따라)
6. harvest 이벤트마다 자동 5D 지도 점 추가 + verdict 갱신
7. 모든 verdict 도착 시 paper finalize
honest_caveats: wall_h는 추정치 — DFT SCF 수렴 어려움/RAM 한계 시 ±30% 변동
vastai CLI 설치 30-60min — py3.9 venv 회피 필요 (memory #1155)
계층 clathrate 구조는 spec 단계, vc-relax 발산 가능 (이 경우 closed-neg)
SSCHA labeh8은 메모리 24GB+ 필요 — pod RAM 확인 필수
5D 5축 모두 ✓ 후보 발견 가능성 = 미지 (current cart 무 후보)
최선 결과 = '293K@50GPa 후보 확정' 또는 '293K@1atm closed-negative + 다음 lens'
recovery_event: 2026-05-29 — 13-job dark (vast transport drop on reboot/migration) recovered via vast_reboot direct call + QE recover resume. 6/7 grinding, y2be2h6 restart-needed. SSH restored ok=1.
